nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I was returning home late at evening after a hard day's work.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I felt very tired and wanted to get on the bed as soon as possible.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: When I finally reached the bed, I collapsed onto it, still feeling tired and sleepy.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I lay like that for quite a long time, but sleep did not come.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: It was already night outside.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Wait, were you trying to fall asleep while in a dream?

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Haven't you ever had those dreams where you wake up but still find yourself in a dream?

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: It was one of those dreams.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Suddenly I heard my mother calling me from the kitchen on the first floor:

nodes.speaker: strikely-mother-clone-dark
nodes.text: Daughter, come have dinner!

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I was a little confused - what kind of dinner could there be in the middle of the night?

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: But I didn't pay any attention to it.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Glad to have a chance to wander around and take my mind off my insomnia, I got up and lazily wandered towards the corridor.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: As I walked out into the hallway, I heard the door from my brother's room open behind me.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I looked towards the door and stared at my mother's wide, frightened eyes.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: She whispered to me:

nodes.speaker: strikely-mother
nodes.text: Strikely, don't ho there, I've heard that too!

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: We both quietly crept into my bedroom, sat on the bed, hugged each other, and stared blankly at the door.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I didn't even have the strength to talk because of fear.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: After some time, we more or less relaxed and fell asleep.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: And then Mom’s voice came from behind the door again:

nodes.speaker: strikely-mother-clone-dark
nodes.text: My daughter, dinner is getting cold!

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: The dream vanished as if by magic.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: After a while, the sound of fading hoofsteps alerted us that it had returned to the kitchen.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I decided to sneak outside to call for help.

nodes.speaker: strikely-mother
nodes.text: Just be careful, please

nodes.speaker: strikely-mother
nodes.text: Be careful, please

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: After leaving the house, I started to frantically think about what to do next.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Suddenly I heard a phone ringing nearby - it was a call from a phone booth.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I picked up the phone and heard a familiar voice:

nodes.speaker: coronel_phone
nodes.text: Strikely we have a problem.

nodes.speaker: coronel_phone
nodes.text: Someone mistakenly used your mom's DNA instead of yours for experiments, and now clones of your mom are filling the entire lab!

nodes.speaker: coronel_phone
nodes.text: You need to sneak in and disable the cloning machine before your mom's clones take over the world!

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: There was no time to think, so I hurried

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: … somewhere …

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: So, you've been caught…

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: …And what happened next?

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: You misunderstood me, everything was wrong. Let me rephrase it.
